title: [Epic] Restore Missing v1 Parity in Portal v2 (Account & i18n)
body: The new React-based Portal v2 is missing a few key features that were present in the v1 dashboard, specifically the Account Settings tab, and the Internationalization (i18n) engine.

issues.title: Implement Account Settings Component & GDPR Self-Deletion
issues.body:
Recreate the v1 Account Settings panel in `AccountSettings.tsx`. Add it to the sidebar navigation. Features required:
- Form to update First Name, Last Name, Preferred Name, and Notification Preferences via `PUT /api/me`.
- Danger Zone: GDPR Self-Deletion (hidden if the user is a `owner`). Requires an email confirmation modal before calling `DELETE /api/me`.
- Include settings for Theme and Language.

issues.title: Implement Portal i18n Engine & Language Selector
issues.body:
Recreate the v1 multi-language support in the React UI.
- Create a generic i18n context/provider that fetches dictionary strings from `/api/i18n?lang=...`.
- Provide a `useTranslation` hook or `formatMessage()` utility to replace hardcoded strings.
- Implement a language dropdown selector (flag + language name) on the `Login.tsx` screen and in the `AccountSettings.tsx` form.
- Save language preference to LocalStorage and update via `PUT /api/me` if authenticated.
